title: Host Agent internal inspection evidence for the demo seed
claim: The system performs host-side internal inspection and identifies dormant private keys without storing private key material.
claim_ko: 현재 데모 시드는 Host Agent 기반 내부 점검을 실행한 증거와 잠든 개인키 탐지 결과를 포함한다.
presentation_guidance: Use this as implementation evidence for the host-side inspection claim, not as a performance benchmark.
Phrase the claim as 'Host Agent covers internal files and configuration that cannot be observed from the network alone'.
Mention dormant private keys as metadata-only findings; never imply that private key contents are collected.
